briefs.title: Council to vote on: Rezoning approval for Bevan Townhomes development in Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on final adoption of a bylaw that would rezone land to allow the 'Bevan Townhomes' project, a residential townhouse development. The bylaw has passed earlier readings and a public hearing, but needs a final council vote to become official.
briefs.action_required: Check if your property or business is near this rezoning area — it may affect your neighbourhood.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Zoning Bylaw Amendment No. 23, 2023 — final adoption vote
